title: Ardanium
description: thits mod add Ardanium nothing more
body:
Ardanium introduces a vibrant, powerful end-game ore and resource tier to Minecraft.

Hunt for the elusive Ardanium Ore deep underground to forge a new line of tools, weapons, and armor that surpass Netherite in durability and strength. Beyond pure stats, Ardanium gear grants unique passive abilities when held or worn, offering distinct strategic advantages in combat and mining.

It’s time for a new tier. Unlock the power of Ardanium.
